name: remora
description: 自包含 rescue agent，内嵌 pi agent harness，用非 Claude 模型做交叉验证与第二意见。

interface.shortDescription: Self-contained rescue agent with a non-Claude second opinion
interface.longDescription: remora embeds the pi agent harness and runs a non-Claude model (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) to investigate stuck problems, cross-validate, and give a genuinely different second opinion. No third-party agent CLI required — only a model endpoint.
defaultPrompt: 把当前卡住的问题打包交给 remora，做独立诊断与交叉验证。
